name: Escarole n New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the new potatoes in their skins in boiling water in a medium-sized saucepan until tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain and reserve the potatoes. Meanwhile, sauté onion and garlic in oil in a large skillet until tender.
3. Tear escarole into 2-inch pieces. Add escarole to the skillet, stirring occasionally until it wilts.
4. Quarter the cooked potatoes and add them to the skillet.
5. Stir in chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
6. Season with pepper.
7. Serve. Makes 4 large servings.
